commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Initial commit: APIbase.pro production stack

Full implementation of APIbase.pro — The API Hub for AI Agents.

Stack: Node.js/TypeScript, Express, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker (16 containers)
Payment: x402 protocol (USDC)
Protocol: MCP (Model Context Protocol)

Includes:
- 13-stage request pipeline
- Agent registration and KYA
- Tool catalog and provider adapters
- Escrow-based billing with execution ledger
- MCP SSE endpoint
- Smart onboarding form (/onboard)
- Nginx reverse proxy with rate limiting
- Prometheus + Grafana + Loki observability
- 27 alert rules, 6 dashboards
- k6 load tests, chaos tests
- CI/CD (GitHub Actions)
- Bootstrap script for fresh server setup
- Production runbook and SLO report

commit.message:
Comprehensive platform audit: fix 25+ security, UX, and backend issues

Security:
- Remove hardcoded admin credentials from client-side code, validate via server-side API route
- Fix CORS: add PUT method, only allow localhost in development
- Add Supabase client env var validation
- Extract admin route path to env var to reduce exposure in JS bundle

Backend:
- Extract shared auth_utils.py (get_current_user) from routes_listings
- Fix derive_city() to map all Australian state/territory postcodes
- Add pagination (limit/offset) to listings search endpoint
- Replace random match scores with attribute-based scoring algorithm
- Fix deal UUID comparison (str() both sides)
- Use admin client for listing creation
- Fix badge labels ("Booked 1+ rooms" not "Purchased 1+ homes")
- Remove GIF from accepted photo upload types

Frontend:
- Create branded 404 and 500 error pages
- Fix hero CTAs to link to info pages for unauthenticated users
- Remove fake press logos and fabricated rating from homepage
- Fix Schema.org URLs to match actual production domain
- Fix render-time router.push calls (move to useEffect)
- Use next/image for homepage images with remote patterns
- Fix footer email link (mailto: instead of Gmail compose URL)
- Unify mobile/desktop support nav links
- Redirect duplicate pages (settings-new -> settings, saved -> wishlist)
- Delete api/hello.ts template leftover
- Fix component name mismatch in seeker search

commit.message:
Fix HUD text wrapping and add Game Speed label

pixui BitmapText has a feedback loop where setting text updates maxWidth
to the rendered width, causing progressive text shrinking. Bypass this
with setText() helper that clears maxWidth before and after each update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: harden path service with transactions, scoped queries, and error codes

- Wrap milestone transition writes in a single DB transaction
- Add txOrDb support to updatePathStatus, advancePathMilestone, updateMilestoneStatus
- Scope getMilestoneById to pathId to prevent cross-path lookups
- Use milestone-scoped confidence map for gate progress (consistent with shouldAdvanceMilestone)
- Add getMilestoneSkillConfidenceMap reader method
- Fix PATH_NOT_FOUND misuse: use PATH_NOT_PAUSED for wrong-state errors
- Remove unnecessary try/catch around resolveEnvironment

Migrate all pages to shadcn/ui + TanStack Query (#145)

## Summary
- Migrate ProjectList, ProjectDetail, SessionDetail, NotFound,
DirBrowser to shadcn/ui components
- Add TanStack Query mutation hooks (`useCreateProject`,
`useDeleteProject`, `useLaunchSession`, `useStopSession`) with automatic
cache invalidation
- Add `@theme inline` block to index.css — fixes Tailwind 4 theme
mapping so `bg-primary`, `text-muted-foreground`, `border-border` etc.
actually render
- Fix artifact dialog text overflow with `whitespace-pre-wrap`
- Remove all legacy CSS (570 lines) except AgentTree ReactFlow styles
- Delete unused `useApi` hook, fully replaced by TanStack Query

## Test plan
- [x] `npm run build` succeeds (2103 modules, no errors)
- [ ] Verify Dashboard, ProjectList, ProjectDetail, SessionDetail pages
render correctly
- [ ] Verify forms work: create project, launch session, stop session,
delete project
- [ ] Verify DirBrowser dialog opens and navigates directories
- [ ] Verify artifact dialog shows content without text overflow
- [ ] Verify Agent Tree visualization renders with correct node colors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: XRAI Spatial Web — Jarvis HUD + Voice Agent + 3D Web Visualization

Cross-platform web scraper that extracts the essence of any webpage and
renders it as a 3D force-directed concept graph with a Jarvis-style HUD.

Core features:
- Auto-detect active browser tab URL (AppleScript, PowerShell, clipboard)
- Rich metadata extraction (Open Graph, JSON-LD, headings, links, media)
- Three.js spatial visualization with TorusGeometry ring nodes
- Jarvis voice agent (Web Speech API + Claude API + tool use)
- 230ms gaze hover delay (visionOS convention), bloom, vignette
- Glass-morphism info cards, progressive disclosure
- QR code sharing, webcam gesture navigation
- WebXR immersive-vr for Apple Vision Pro
- JSON design token theme system (hot-swappable)
- Modular hooks-based event architecture
- Zero build step (ES modules + esm.sh CDN imports)
- 23 tests passing (node:test)

Architecture: 50+ modules across server agent, HUD render, interaction,
theme, sharing, and stub layers for future multiplayer/provenance/annotations.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

refactor(vaccines): user-friendly French names, consistent display everywhere

VACCINE_REFERENCE rewritten:

- Piroplasmose → "Piroplasmose (tiques)" (adds context)

(e.g., "DHPPI") to the canonical user-friendly name.

Applied everywhere: recommendations, notifications, reminders,
DailySnapshot, VaccineCard rows, NextActionCard, PDF export.

commit.message:
Redesign scoring system and add Investor-directed multi-run triage

Major changes to the adversarial triage skill:
- Add Socratic questioning framework (5 structured questions) for Challenger
- Support multiple Pusher-Challenger pairs (1-3 angles) with parallel execution
- Add point scoring system with asymmetric penalties per role
- Add Investor subagent for ROI-based run allocation with charter constraints
- Style-dependent scoring tables for Arbiter and Investor
- Style-dependent stopping thresholds (wide-funnel: 10%, measured: 20%, paranoid: 30%)
- Remove safe harbor: DISPUTED earns 0 (was +1) for both Pusher and Challenger
- Remove unverifiable penalties: divestment bonus and premature stop
- Explicit parallel execution order (Pushers -> Challengers -> Arbiter)
- Improved description with trigger phrases for better routing
- Effort auto-calibration from query scope/stakes/specificity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: project x-ray — cleanup, performance, structured output, smart routing

Full-spectrum audit + upgrades from automated X-ray:

Cleanup:
- Remove dead ESLint deps + config (replaced by oxlint)
- Remove scaffold greet() command and deprecated PROVIDER_MODELS shim
- Delete empty dd-ui/dd-typewriter stub crates (0 code, 0 tests)
- Extract pipeline timeouts/retries, prompt healer thresholds to named constants
- Extract shared withTimeout utility (was duplicated in base.ts + dag.ts)
- Move Grimoire URL to VITE_GRIMOIRE_URL env var with fallback

Performance:
- Canvas: disable alpha channel (~2x compositing speedup)
- Canvas: cache ctx + font/baseline (avoid per-frame re-init)
- Canvas: color-batched draw passes (reduce fillStyle thrashing)
- Canvas: textRendering=optimizeSpeed (skip kerning/ligatures)
- SQLite: explicit WAL mode + NORMAL sync + foreign_keys=ON

Reliability:
- Provider-native structured output (Gemini responseSchema, Claude
  tool-use, OpenAI json_schema strict mode)
- JSON schemas for 5 output types (mechanics, character, backgrounds,
  options) — no new dependencies
- Existing 3-layer validation retained as safety net

Intelligence:
- Cost-aware MAB model filtering (flash vs pro tier per callsite)
- Capability-based filtering (structured output requirement)
- 20 new router tests for filtering logic

198 tests pass (178 → 198). Net -3,188 lines.

commit.message:
Add 2-point slippage to paper entry prices (conservative tracking)

LONG entries: +2 points (paid more). SHORT entries: -2 points (sold
for less). Exits at signal price unchanged. Ensures paper PnL is
always slightly worse than real performance. On MNQ: ~$10/contract
per entry, ~$20 round-trip adverse per contract.

commit.message:
Remove multiplier from paper qty — use recorder defaults only (qty=1)

Paper trades should track at the recorder's initial_position_size
(default 1), not aggregate multipliers across all trader accounts.
The multiplier summed to 15 (10+5 across two enabled traders) when
user expected 1. Multiplier is a per-account concern for real
execution, not paper tracking.

feat: Dynamic City Simulation Engine with sectors, waves, and events

- src/game/city/types.ts: CityState, SectorState, CityWave, CityEvent, CityPlayerSummary
- src/game/city/seed-waves.ts: 7 city wave archetypes (tech boom, recession, construction, etc.)
- src/game/city/seed-events.ts: 12 city event templates with sector/salary/investment impacts
- src/game/city/sector-impact.ts: daily impact resolver + economy health score

- src/game/city/city-simulation.ts: daily simulation entry point (runDailySimulation)
- src/game/city/city-store.ts: Zustand store (persisted as "shahre-man-city")

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: adoption lifecycle — plan before adopting, nag until decided

Adoptions now follow a lifecycle:
  evaluate → plan → pending-approval → active → review → improve/ditch

Key changes:
- "Adopt" recommendation triggers a planning phase, not immediate action
- Adoption plans go to tracking/adoption-plans/[id].md with time
  estimates, risks, hypotheses with confidence levels, and rollback
- Items in pending-approval are re-surfaced every review cycle
- Items pending >7 days get escalated in digests
- Items pending >14 days trigger a direct approve/reject/defer prompt
- Pending items never silently disappear

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Implement shared contact identity (Option B signal dedup)

- New contact_identities table: one record per real person, shared across users
- contacts.identity_id links each user's contact to the shared identity
- signals.identity_id: signals belong to the person, not the user relationship
- Ingest: checks identity.last_scraped_at — skips if scraped within 20h by any user
- All signal creation uses identity_id for cross-user dedup
- Feed + contact detail queries use identity_id with contact_id fallback for legacy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add manual round and party name editing with optimistic updates

Implement clickable UI elements for editing round number and party name
with instant optimistic updates and server synchronization.

Round Editing:
- Add RoundEditDialog component with numeric input and quick adjust buttons (+/-1, 5, 10)
- Add setRound server action with validation (min: 1, max: 999)
- Add optimisticSetRound to usePartyPolling hook
- Make round Badge clickable in PartyInfoCard
- Maintain current turn index when changing rounds

Party Name Editing:
- Add PartyNameEditDialog component with text input and character counter
- Add updatePartyName server action with validation (min: 3, max: 50 chars)
- Add optimisticUpdatePartyName to usePartyPolling hook with partyName state
- Make party title clickable in PartyInfoCard
- Update PartyPage to use displayParty object with optimistic name

Both features follow the same optimistic update pattern:
- Instant UI feedback
- Background server synchronization
- Automatic rollback on errors
- Duplicate operation prevention
- D&D themed styling with hover effects

commit.message:
fix(deep-link): 3 bugs from code review — matchVaccineKey, reactive URL, scroll timing

1. Export matchVaccineKey from healthStatus.js and use it everywhere
   instead of exact-match lookups (fixes non-canonical vaccine titles)
2. Sante.jsx reads vaccineKey reactively from searchParams instead of
   capturing once in useState (fixes second notification click)
3. Increase scroll delay from 100ms to 350ms so VaccineCard expand
   animation settles before scrollIntoView measures position

commit.message:
fix: larger embers, slower float, accent glow at bottom edge

Ember sizes ~2x larger (5-17px glow, 3-5px sparks, was 3-9px/2px).
Float duration ~2x slower (5-10s, was 2.5-5s). Added a faint
radial gradient glow at the bottom of the container in the accent
color — peeks up from the edge for ambient atmosphere.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Navigate to dashboard instantly on sign-in, auth completes in background

Firebase Auth can take several seconds to verify credentials. Instead of
blocking the user on the login page during this wait, navigate to the
dashboard immediately and show a loading spinner there while auth finishes.

A sessionStorage flag (authPending) signals the dashboard to hold its
redirect guard open during the in-flight auth request, preventing a
premature redirect back to login.

commit.message:
Pull-to-dismiss aircraft info panel from anywhere in content

Swipe down anywhere on the info panel to dismiss it — no need to grab
the handle bar. Activates when content is scrolled to top and finger
moves downward. Panel follows finger in real-time with opacity fade.
Swipe back up mid-gesture to keep it open. Smooth animated dismissal
when dragged past 80px threshold, snaps back otherwise.
